pages.name: Dashboard 1
pages.description: Multi-Measures dashboard demonstrating combined axis charts. Uses Field Parameters in Power BI to replicate Tableau Measure Names/Values pattern.

visuals.title: Dual Axis — Sales & Profit over Time
visuals.note: Tableau dual axis -> Power BI secondary Y-axis or Field Parameter on shared axis

visuals.title: Individual Axis — Sales, Profit, Quantity
visuals.note: Each measure on its own axis scale using small multiples or Field Parameter

visuals.title: Mixed — Bar (Sales) + Line (Profit)
visuals.note: Combo chart with bars for Sales and line for Profit

visuals.title: Single Axis — Measure Names & Values
visuals.note: Use Field Parameter (MeasureSelector) to allow user to pick which measures appear on the shared axis
